name: Trade Analyst
description: Analyzuje breakout signály a vytváří kompletní trade setup karty

config.query: SELECT id, coin, direction, signal_type, signal_data FROM signals WHERE status = 'candidate' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW()) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT available_capital, total_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trades WHERE status = 'open') as open_positions_count FROM portfolio WHERE id = 1

body.query: SELECT direction, confidence, predicted_move_pct FROM price_predictor WHERE coin = '{{coin}}'

config.query: UPDATE signals SET status = $2, trade_card = $3, entry_price = $4, stop_loss = $5, trailing_atr_mult = $6, trail_activation_pct = $7, position_size_usdt = $8, risk_amount_usdt = $9, confidence_score = $10, reasoning = $11, mindsdb_prediction = $12, analyzed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
